Phase 1: Foundation - new crates + VCR infrastructure
description:
# Phase 1: Foundation (Tuần 1-2)

## Background
jcode hiện có hệ thống provider quản lý yếu: 8 crate `jcode-provider-*` rời rạc, mỗi crate tự xử lý auth/retry/streaming riêng, `jcode-provider-core/lib.rs` 54KB chứa trait `Provider` duy nhất cứng nhắc. PARITY.md IX chỉ có 22/24 feature ✅ (Gemini + Copilot ⚠️ chưa có streaming). UX quản lý provider chưa có TUI `/provider`, `/model` command đúng nghĩa.

Reference: opencode (Bun/TS) đã giải quyết vấn đề này bằng **3-layer architecture + 4-axis route** (Protocol × Endpoint × Auth × Framing). oh-my-pi (TS+Rust) bổ sung **13-dialect inband tool-call layer** cho các provider Trung Quốc. pi-agent-rust cho thấy Rust-native pattern `Arc<dyn Provider>` + `provider_metadata` registry hoạt động tốt.

## Goal
Tạo 5 crate Rust mới trong workspace jcode với kiến trúc opencode-faithful, **additive** (không phá code cũ), cho phép Phase 2+ migrate từng provider sang dần.

## Deliverables
1. **jcode-llm-core** (~3000 LOC) — 4-axis route, Auth trait with combinators, Framing enum, Transport enum, canonical schema types (LlmRequest/LlmEvent/Usage/LlmError)
2. **jcode-llm-protocols** (~5000 LOC) — 7 wire-format protocols: AnthropicMessages, OpenAiChat, OpenAiResponses, BedrockConverse, GoogleGenerativeAi, OllamaChat, AzureOpenAiResponses
3. **jcode-llm-dialects** (~2000 LOC) — Dialect trait, InbandScanner, factory + 2 dialects ban đầu (anthropic, xml fallback)
4. **jcode-llm-providers** (~1000 LOC) — Provider facades: anthropic.ts, openai.ts, oai-compatible.ts, google.ts, amazon-bedrock.ts
5. **jcode-llm-vcr** (~500 LOC) — VCR recorder: Record/Replay/Disabled modes, cassette JSON format
6. **8 VCR cassettes** — 1 cassette/8 provider hiện tại (anthropic, openai, gemini, openrouter, bedrock, antigravity, copilot, env)
7. **Schemars JSON Schema generation** — auto-generate user-facing config schema

## Reference repos
- opencode `packages/llm/AGENTS.md` — kiến trúc 3-layer tổng quan
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/client.ts:36-53` — `Route<B,P,E,S>` interface
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/auth.ts:25-38` — Auth + Credential abstractions
- opencode `packages/llm/src/schema/{messages,events,errors}.ts` — canonical types
- pi-agent-rust `src/provider_metadata.rs` — single source of truth registry
- pi-agent-rust `src/vcr.rs` — VCR test infrastructure
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/dialect/factory.ts:15-28` — dialect dispatch pattern

## Source plan
Xem implementation plan gốc: "Implementation Plan: jcode Multi-Provider 2.0" sections 3-6 (Data Structures, Pseudocode, Implementation Code).

## Success criteria
- `cargo build -p jcode-llm-core -p jcode-llm-protocols -p jcode-llm-dialects -p jcode-llm-providers -p jcode-llm-vcr` thành công
- Tất cả 5 crate có unit test pass
- 8 VCR cassette được record và replay test pass
- 7 protocol có ít nhất 1 test từ VCR cassette
- 2 dialect đầu tiên (anthropic, xml) có test với string input mẫu
- Existing 8 crate `jcode-provider-*` vẫn compile và pass test
- `cargo build --release` time tăng < 10% (do code mới là additive)

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG migrate bất kỳ provider nào sang kiến trúc mới (làm ở Phase 2-3)
- KHÔNG viết dialect thứ 3 trở đi (làm ở Phase 5)
- KHÔNG thêm provider mới ngoài 8 hiện tại (làm ở Phase 4-5)
- KHÔNG rewrite TUI (làm ở Phase 6)
- KHÔNG touch code ngoài `crates/` (no src/, no docs/ ngoài markdown mới)

## Risks
- **Risk: Cargo workspace member thêm 5 crate có thể conflict với Cargo.lock hiện tại.** Mitigation: dùng `[workspace.dependencies]` để share version, kiểm tra `cargo metadata` sau khi add.
- **Risk: VCR cassette với response size lớn (SSE dài) sẽ làm repo nặng.** Mitigation: giới hạn cassette 200KB/probe, dùng `flate2` compression nếu cần.
- **Risk: 7 protocol implementations trong 2 tuần là aggressive.** Mitigation: mỗi protocol tối thiểu đủ để 1 happy-path test pass, edge case để Phase 7 polish.

## Estimated effort
~60-80 giờ work. 5 crate mới + 8 cassette + 7 protocol tối thiểu + dialect scanner.

title: 1.10: Update AGENTS.md với multi-provider 2.0 architecture overview
description:
## Background
AGENTS.md hiện tại không đề cập multi-provider 2.0. Sau Phase 1, cần update.

## What to build
Append to AGENTS.md (sau phần Notepad):
```markdown
## Multi-Provider 2.0 (mới từ 0.2.0)

Hệ thống provider mới migrate từ opencode + oh-my-pi pattern.

### Architecture
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/` — 4-axis route, Auth, Framing, Transport, canonical schema
- `crates/jcode-llm-protocols/` — wire format (Anthropic, OpenAI Chat, OpenAI Responses, Bedrock, Gemini, ...)
- `crates/jcode-llm-dialects/` — 13 inband tool-call scanner (MiniMax, Kimi, Qwen3, GLM-5, ...)
- `crates/jcode-llm-providers/` — provider facades
- `crates/jcode-llm-vcr/` — recorded-replay test infra
- `crates/jcode-provider-app/` — Catalog, Integration, Credential, Plugin
- `crates/jcode-provider-metadata/` — ALL_PROVIDERS registry, CompatConfig
- `crates/jcode-models-dev/` — fetch models.dev JSON

### Conventions
- New provider = 1 line trong ALL_PROVIDERS + (optional) 1 file protocol + 1 file dialect
- New dialect = 1 file trong crates/jcode-llm-dialects/src/dialects/ + add to factory
- Test = 1 VCR cassette + 1 E2E test (cargo test với VCR_REPLAY=true)
- OAuth flows tự động detect qua Integration::start_oauth
```

## Reference
- opencode AGENTS.md (multi-package)
- AGENTS.md hiện tại

## Success criteria
- AGENTS.md có section Multi-Provider 2.0
- Section ngắn gọn, đủ để dev mới onboard

title: 1.13: Definition of Done - chuẩn chung cho mọi subtask
description:

title: 1.2: Define canonical schema types (LlmRequest, LlmEvent, Usage, LlmError)
description:
## Background

## What to build

- `Role` enum: System, User, Assistant, Tool
- `ContentPart` enum: Text, Media, ToolCall, ToolResult, Reasoning

title: 1.3: Implement Auth trait với combinators (orElse, andThen, bearer, header, remove, custom)
description:
## Background
opencode's `Auth` trait ở `packages/llm/src/route/auth.ts:25-38` có combinator chain (orElse, andThen) cho phép: `Auth.optional(apiKey).orElse(Auth.config(env)).pipe(Auth.header("x-api-key"))`. Rust equivalent: Box<dyn Auth> với method chain.

## What to build
File: `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/auth.rs`

Implement:
- `pub trait Auth: Send + Sync { async fn apply(&self, request: &mut Request) -> Result<(), AuthError>; fn describe(&self) -> &'static str; }`
- 6 concrete types:
  - `BearerAuth { key: String }` → `Authorization: Bearer <key>`
  - `HeaderAuth { name: String, key: String }` → `<name>: <key>` (vd `x-api-key: sk-...`)
  - `RemoveAuth { name: String }` → xóa header (vd `Authorization` cho Azure)
  - `CustomAuth(Box<dyn Fn(&mut Request) -> Result<(), AuthError> + Send + Sync>)` → cho SigV4
  - `OptionalAuth { key: Option<String>, name: &'static str }` → Bearer nếu key, Noop nếu None
  - `ConfigAuth { env: String }` → lazy `std::env::var(env)`, nếu missing trả AuthError
  - `OrElseAuth { first: Box<dyn Auth>, second: Box<dyn Auth> }` → thử first, fail thì second
  - `NoopAuth` → không làm gì (cho keyless local provider)
- 5 constructor methods trên `dyn Auth`:
  - `Auth::bearer(key)` 
  - `Auth::header(name, key)`
  - `Auth::remove(name)`
  - `Auth::custom(f)`
  - `Auth::optional(key, name)`
  - `Auth::config(env)`
- 1 combinator: `auth.or_else(other) -> Box<dyn Auth>`
- `pub struct Request { pub url: String, pub method: String, pub headers: HashMap<String, String>, pub body: Vec<u8> }`
- `pub enum AuthError { Missing, Invalid, Custom(String) }`

## Reference
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/auth.ts:25-38` — Auth + Credential
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/auth.ts:43-52` — credential(load) factory
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/auth.ts:96-105` — Auth.none/headers/remove
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/auth-options.ts:21-31` — AuthOptions.bearer pattern
- pi-agent-rust `src/auth.rs:571-644` — resolve_api_key cascade

## Success criteria
- `cargo test -p jcode-llm-core auth` pass
- Unit test: `Auth::bearer("k")` set `Authorization: Bearer k`
- Unit test: `Auth::header("x-api-key", "k")` set `x-api-key: k`
- Unit test: `Auth::remove("Authorization")` xóa header
- Unit test: `Auth::optional(Some("k"), "apiKey").or_else(Auth::config("OPENAI_API_KEY"))` set header từ optional
- Unit test: `Auth::config("MISSING_ENV")` returns `Err(AuthError::Missing)`

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG implement OAuth flow (làm ở jcode-provider-app Phase 6)
- KHÔNG implement SigV4 (làm trong Bedrock protocol Phase 3)

title: 1.4: Implement Route (4-axis composition) + Framing + Transport
description:
## Background
4-axis route là trái tim của opencode. Mỗi route = Protocol (what wire format) × Endpoint (where) × Auth (how) × Framing/Transport (bytes→frames). Compose orthogonal = thêm provider mới chỉ tốn 5-15 line.

## What to build
Files:
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/route.rs` — Route struct + RoutePatch
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/protocol.rs` — Protocol trait
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/endpoint.rs` — Endpoint + PathSpec
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/framing.rs` — Framing enum + SseFrame type
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/transport.rs` — Transport enum
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/provider_id.rs` — `ProviderId(String)` newtype
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/route_id.rs` — `RouteId(&'static str)` newtype
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/model_ref.rs` — `ModelRef { provider_id, id, variant }` + `ModelRef::parse("anthropic/claude-opus-4-8:high")`

Type signatures (xem implementation plan gốc section 3 để có full code):

```rust
pub trait Protocol: Send + Sync {
    type Body: Serialize + DeserializeOwned + Send + 'static;
    type Event: Send + 'static;
    type State: Default + Send;
    fn id(&self) -> &'static str;
    fn body_from_request(&self, req: &LlmRequest) -> Result<Self::Body, LlmError>;
    fn step(&self, frame: Frame, state: &mut Self::State) -> StepOutput<Self::Event>;
}

pub struct Route<B, F, E, S> {
    pub id: RouteId,
    pub provider: ProviderId,
    pub protocol: Arc<dyn Protocol<Body=B, Frame=F, Event=E, State=S>>,
    pub endpoint: Endpoint,
    pub auth: Box<dyn Auth>,
    pub framing: Framing,
    pub transport: Transport,
    pub defaults: RouteDefaults,
    pub body_overlay: Option<Arc<dyn Fn(serde_json::Value) -> serde_json::Value + Send + Sync>>,
}

impl Route { pub fn with(self, patch: RoutePatch) -> Self; pub fn model(self, id: ModelId) -> PreparedRoute; }

pub enum Framing { Sse, AwsEventStream, WebSocketBinary }
pub enum Transport { Http, WebSocket }
pub enum PathSpec { Static(&'static str), Dynamic(Arc<dyn Fn(&RequestMeta) -> String + Send + Sync>) }
```

## Reference
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/client.ts:36-53` — Route interface
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/client.ts:296-332` — Route.make constructor
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/protocol.ts:36-63` — Protocol trait
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/endpoint.ts:22-51` — Endpoint
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/transport/http.ts` — HTTP transport
- pi-agent-rust `src/provider.rs:28-48` — Provider trait (Rust equivalent)

## Success criteria
- `cargo build -p jcode-llm-core` pass
- Unit test: `AnthropicProtocol::route().with(auth_header_patch)` changes auth
- Unit test: `ModelRef::parse("anthropic/claude-opus-4-8:high")` returns ModelRef with variant Some("high")
- Unit test: `ModelRef::parse("openai/gpt-5")` returns ModelRef with variant None

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG implement concrete protocol (làm ở jcode-llm-protocols)
- KHÔNG implement HTTP transport thực sự (chỉ enum + interface, 1.5 VCR sẽ dùng)

title: 1.5: Implement VCR recorder (Record/Replay/Disabled modes)
description:
## Background
VCR (Video Cassette Recorder) ghi lại HTTP request/response thật vào JSON cassette, replay trong test để deterministic + free + fast. opencode có hàng trăm cassette; pi-agent-rust `src/vcr.rs` implement pattern này.

## What to build
File: `crates/jcode-llm-vcr/src/lib.rs`

Implement:
```rust
pub struct Cassette { name, recorded_at, interactions: Vec<Interaction> }
pub struct Interaction { request: RecordedRequest, response: RecordedResponse }
pub struct RecordedRequest { method, url, headers, body: serde_json::Value }
pub struct RecordedResponse { status, headers, body: Vec<u8> }  // raw bytes for SSE

pub enum VcrMode { Replay, Record, Disabled }

pub struct VcrRecorder {
    mode: VcrMode,
    cassette: Arc<RwLock<Cassette>>,
    path: PathBuf,
}

impl VcrRecorder {
    pub fn load(path: &Path, mode: VcrMode) -> Result<Self, VcrError>;
    pub async fn record_or_replay(&self, req: &RecordedRequest) -> Result<RecordedResponse, VcrError>;
    pub async fn flush(&self) -> Result<(), VcrError>;
}

pub enum VcrError { NoMatch(String), IoError(std::io::Error), SerdeError(serde_json::Error), Disabled, ... }
```

Behavior:
- `Replay`: tìm interaction match (same method+url+body), return response. Nếu không có → `VcrError::NoMatch`
- `Record`: gọi HTTP thật (qua reqwest), save vào cassette, return response
- `Disabled`: return `VcrError::Disabled`
- `flush()`: ghi cassette ra disk (chỉ khi `Record` mode)

Match algorithm: simple equality trên (method, url, body). Không cần match headers để tránh test fragility.

## Reference
- pi-agent-rust `src/vcr.rs` — VcrRecorder struct + mode dispatch
- opencode `packages/llm/test/recorded-test.ts` — replay test wrapper
- opencode `packages/llm/test/fixtures/recordings/` — cassette format mẫu (50KB+ files)

## Success criteria
- `cargo build -p jcode-llm-vcr` pass
- Unit test: ghi 1 cassette, load lại, replay trả về đúng response
- Unit test: `Replay` mode với unmatched request → `VcrError::NoMatch`
- Unit test: `Disabled` mode → `VcrError::Disabled`
- Integration test: dùng `wiremock` mock HTTP server, ghi cassette với `Record`, replay với `Replay`

## Out of scope

title: 1.6: Ghi 8 VCR cassette cho 8 provider hiện tại (anthropic, openai, gemini, openrouter, bedrock, antigravity, copilot, env)
description:
## Background
Trước khi migrate bất kỳ provider nào, cần VCR cassette làm regression net. Mỗi cassette chứa 1+ interaction HTTP thật từ API provider.

## What to build
Tạo 8 cassette file trong `crates/jcode-llm-vcr/tests/fixtures/`:

1. `anthropic/basic.json` — POST /v1/messages với prompt "Hello", model claude-sonnet-4-6
2. `openai/basic.json` — POST /v1/responses với prompt "Hello", model gpt-5
3. `gemini/basic.json` — POST /v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-pro:generateContent
4. `openrouter/basic.json` — POST /api/v1/chat/completions, model anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6
5. `bedrock/basic.json` — POST /model/anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6/converse-stream
6. `antigravity/basic.json` — local fake provider
7. `copilot/basic.json` — POST /chat/completions, model gpt-5
8. `env/basic.json` — local fake provider

Mỗi cassette có 1 interaction: simple text request → text response. Body ≤ 50KB.

## Workflow
1. Tạo script `scripts/record_cassettes.sh` chạy 8 lần với `RECORD=true` env var
2. Cần API key cho 5 provider thật (anthropic, openai, gemini, openrouter, bedrock); 3 provider còn lại dùng local mock
3. Sau khi ghi, commit cassette vào git

## Reference
- opencode `packages/llm/test/fixtures/recordings/` — file format mẫu
- pi-agent-rust `tests/fixtures/*.json` — cassette examples

## Success criteria
- 8 cassette file exist, tổng size < 500KB
- Mỗi cassette có ≥ 1 interaction với valid RecordedRequest/Response
- `cargo test -p jcode-llm-vcr` replay pass
- Cassette parse được bằng `Cassette::load(path)`

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG ghi nhiều interaction/cassette (chỉ basic happy path; Phase 7 sẽ mở rộng lên 50+)
- KHÔNG record từ user account thật (dùng dev account)

title: Phase 2: Migrate Anthropic + OpenAI sang kiến trúc mới
description:
# Phase 2: Migrate Anthropic + OpenAI (Tuần 3-4)

## Background
Sau khi Phase 1 tạo xong 5 crate mới (`jcode-llm-{core,protocols,dialects,providers,vcr}`) với 7 protocol tối thiểu + 8 VCR cassette, Phase 2 migrate 2 provider được dùng nhiều nhất sang kiến trúc mới. Mục tiêu: validate rằng kiến trúc mới có thể thay thế hoàn toàn 2 provider cũ mà không phá consumer.

## Goal
Migrate `jcode-provider-anthropic` và `jcode-provider-openai` sang dùng `AnthropicMessagesProtocol::route()` và `OpenAiResponsesProtocol::route()` + `OpenAiChatProtocol::route()`. **Public API của 2 crate này KHÔNG đổi** — chỉ implementation bên trong đổi.

## Deliverables
1. **AnthropicMessagesProtocol** đầy đủ — không chỉ happy path mà còn:
   - 4-breakpoint cache marker cap (silently drop excess — opencode pattern)
   - Tool result content có thể là String HOẶC array of text/image blocks (preserve base64)
   - OAuth token detection → set `anthropic-beta` cho claude-code fingerprint
   - `anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access: true` header
   - Per-model native chronological system updates (chỉ cho `claude-opus-4-8`)
2. **OpenAiResponsesProtocol** đầy đủ:
   - HTTP + WebSocket transport (opencode pattern)
   - Shared `OpenAIResponsesCoreFields` cho cả 2 transport
   - Provider-executed tools (web_search, file_search, code_interpreter, mcp, image_generation, computer_use) surface as `tool-call`/`tool-result` events với `providerExecuted: true`
   - Encrypted content handling (jcode-specific)
3. **OpenAiChatProtocol** — cho OAI-compat gateways (cerebras, groq, ... dùng ở Phase 4)
4. **Migrate jcode-provider-anthropic** — internals dùng `AnthropicProtocol::route()`, public API giữ nguyên
5. **Migrate jcode-provider-openai** — internals dùng `OpenAiResponsesProtocol` + `OpenAiChatProtocol`, public API giữ nguyên
6. **E2E VCR test** cho mỗi provider (5 test/provider, 10 test total)

## Reference
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/anthropic-messages.ts:400-487` — content blocks, cache markers
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/anthropic-messages.ts:524-528` — 4-breakpoint cap
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/openai-responses.ts:33-160` — HTTP+WS shared core
- claude-code `src/services/api/openai/responsesAdapter.ts` — ChatGPT ↔ Responses adapter
- jcode `crates/jcode-provider-anthropic/src/lib.rs` (820 lines, hiện tại) — public API cần giữ
- jcode `crates/jcode-provider-openai/src/{request,stream,websocket_health}.rs` — public API cần giữ

## Source plan
Implementation plan gốc sections 5 (Implementation Code) — đặc biệt file `crates/jcode-llm-protocols/src/anthropic_messages.rs`.

## Success criteria
- `jcode-provider-anthropic` và `jcode-provider-openai` pass existing test suite (no regression)
- 10 E2E VCR test mới pass
- Behavior identical cho consumer (không cần đổi code ở `jcode-app-core`, `jcode-agent-runtime`, ...)
- `cargo test --workspace` pass
- `cargo bench streaming_anthropic` shows p50 < 200ms với VCR replay
- `cargo doc` không có warning

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG migrate 6 provider còn lại (Phase 3)
- KHÔNG thêm provider mới (Phase 4)
- KHÔNG thêm dialect (Phase 5)
- KHÔNG đổi TUI (Phase 6)
- KHÔNG đổi failover behavior (Phase 7) — chỉ thêm reactive walker mà chưa wire vào

## Risks
- **Risk: Public API của 2 crate cũ có thể không tương thích 1:1 với abstraction mới.** Mitigation: giữ wrapper struct trong crate cũ gọi vào `Route.stream()` của crate mới, không xóa bất kỳ pub item nào.
- **Risk: Streaming event order có thể khác so với impl cũ.** Mitigation: chạy diff test (cùng input, compare event stream).

## Estimated effort
~50-60 giờ. 2 protocol + 2 migration + 10 E2E test.

title: 2.1: Implement AnthropicMessagesProtocol đầy đủ (4-breakpoint cache, OAuth beta, server tools)
description:
## Background
Anthropic wire format là distinct nhất (system top-level, content blocks, cache markers). Phase 1 đã có protocol skeleton + VCR cassette basic.json; Phase 2.1 hoàn thiện.

## What to build
File: `crates/jcode-llm-protocols/src/anthropic_messages.rs`

Implement đầy đủ:
- `AnthropicBody` struct: model, system (Vec<AnthropicSystemBlock>), messages, tools, tool_choice, max_tokens, temperature, thinking, stream
- `body_from_request()`: convert LlmRequest → AnthropicBody, bao gồm:
  - System messages tách riêng (top-level)
  - Cache marker trên mỗi block nếu cache=auto, **4-breakpoint cap silently drop excess**
  - Tool result content có thể là String HOẶC array of text/image blocks
- `step()`: xử lý SSE events:
  - message_start → set state.usage
  - content_block_start (text/thinking/tool_use) → emit TextStart/ReasoningStart/ToolInputStart
  - content_block_delta (text_delta/thinking_delta/input_json_delta) → emit Delta
  - content_block_stop → emit End (text/thinking) hoặc ToolCall (sau khi tool_stream.finish())
  - message_delta → merge usage, set stop_reason
  - message_stop → emit Done
  - error → emit ProviderError
- `buildAnthropicHeaders()`:
  - Detect OAuth token (prefix `sk-ant-oat`) → set `anthropic-beta` cho claude-code fingerprint
  - Set `anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access: true`
  - Set `x-app: cli`
  - Override User-Agent cho OAuth
- Server tools (web_search, code_execution, web_fetch) → `provider_executed: true` trên ToolCall/ToolResult events
- Per-model native chronological system updates (chỉ `claude-opus-4-8`); model khác dùng `<system-update>...</system-update>` wrapped-user fallback

## Reference
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/anthropic-messages.ts:400-487` — content blocks
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/anthropic-messages.ts:524-528` — 4-breakpoint cap
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/anthropic-messages.ts:822-844` — protocol + route
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/providers/anthropic.ts:181-249` — header quirks
- claude-code `src/services/api/claude.ts` — query loop

## Success criteria
- `cargo test -p jcode-llm-protocols anthropic_messages` pass
- VCR replay `anthropic/basic.json` produces same event sequence
- 4-breakpoint cap test: request với 10 system parts → body chỉ có 4
- OAuth header test: bearer token prefix `sk-ant-oat` → set `anthropic-beta`
- 100% of AnthropicMessages events từ VCR cassette match (no missing/dropped)

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG implement streaming mới (Anthropic đã streaming, dùng VCR)
- KHÔNG thêm dialect (Anthropic native JSON tool call)

title: 2.2: Migrate jcode-provider-anthropic (820 lines) sang dùng AnthropicMessagesProtocol
description:
## Background
jcode-provider-anthropic hiện có code streaming/auth/retry riêng. Sau khi AnthropicMessagesProtocol đầy đủ (2.1), migrate crate này.

## What to build
Edit `crates/jcode-provider-anthropic/src/lib.rs`:
- Giữ public API không đổi (re-export các struct, function cũ)
- Internal implementation: instantiate `AnthropicProtocol::route()`, call `route.stream(req)` thay vì code streaming riêng
- Map `ProviderRequest` (cũ) ↔ `LlmRequest` (mới) ở 1 adapter layer
- Map `ProviderStreamEvent` (cũ) ↔ `LlmEvent` (mới)
- Move auth logic vào `Auth::or_else(Auth::config("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"))`
- Move retry logic vào caller (jcode-app-core) — không phải concern của provider crate

## Reference
- jcode `crates/jcode-provider-anthropic/src/lib.rs` (820 lines, 48 pub items) — code cũ cần migrate
- opencode `packages/llm/src/providers/anthropic.ts` — facade pattern (35 lines)

## Success criteria
- `cargo test -p jcode-provider-anthropic` pass (existing tests)
- `cargo build --workspace` pass
- 0 behavior change cho consumer
- LOC giảm từ 820 → ~300 (logic move sang jcode-llm-protocols)

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG đổi public API (deprecate ở Phase 8)
- KHÔNG refactor streaming (chỉ wrap)

title: 2.3: Implement OpenAiResponsesProtocol với HTTP + WebSocket transport
description:
## Background
OpenAI Responses API có 2 transport: HTTP (POST /v1/responses) và WebSocket (response.create message). opencode share core fields cho cả 2.

## What to build
File: `crates/jcode-llm-protocols/src/openai_responses.rs`

Implement:
- `OpenAIResponsesBody` struct: model, input (Vec<ResponseInputItem>), tools, tool_choice, max_output_tokens, temperature, top_p, stream, parallel_tool_calls, store, include, reasoning
- `OpenAIResponsesInputItem` enum: Message (role+content), FunctionCall, FunctionCallOutput
- `body_from_request()`: convert LlmRequest → OpenAIResponsesBody
- HTTP transport: SSE stream từ `POST /v1/responses`
- WebSocket transport: gửi `response.create` message qua WS, nhận events
- Shared `OpenAIResponsesCoreFields` struct (xem opencode `openai-responses.ts:33-160`)
- Provider-executed tools: web_search, file_search, code_interpreter, mcp, image_generation, computer_use, local_shell → surface as `tool-call`/`tool-result` với `provider_executed: true`
- Encrypted content handling (jcode-specific): nếu response có `encrypted_content`, lưu vào `provider_metadata`

## Reference
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/openai-responses.ts:33-160` — shared core fields
- opencode `packages/llm/src/route/transport/websocket.ts` — WS transport
- claude-code `src/services/api/openai/responsesAdapter.ts` — Chat ↔ Responses adapter
- jcode `crates/jcode-provider-openai/src/websocket_health.rs` — existing WS code

## Success criteria
- `cargo test -p jcode-llm-protocols openai_responses` pass
- VCR replay `openai/basic.json` produces same event sequence
- WS transport test: mock WS server, send response.create, verify events emitted
- Provider-executed tools: web_search ToolCall có `provider_executed: true`
- Encrypted content: response có field → lưu vào provider_metadata.encrypted_content

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG implement OpenAI Chat Completions protocol (làm ở 2.4)
- KHÔNG migrate ChatGPT OAuth (làm ở Phase 6)

title: 2.4: Implement OpenAiChatProtocol (cho OpenAI-compat gateways: cerebras, groq, deepseek, ...)
description:
## Background
Nhiều provider (Cerebras, Groq, DeepSeek, Fireworks, TogetherAI, DeepInfra, OpenRouter, xAI) dùng OpenAI Chat Completions format. Protocol này là canonical cho OAI-compat.

## What to build

Implement:
- `OpenAIChatBody` struct: model, messages (Vec<OpenAIChatMessage>), tools, tool_choice, max_tokens (rename to max_completion_tokens nếu o1), temperature, top_p, stream, parallel_tool_calls
- `OpenAIChatMessage` struct: role (system/user/assistant/tool), content (String hoặc Vec<ContentPart>), tool_calls, tool_call_id
- `body_from_request()`: convert LlmRequest, respect CompatConfig.max_tokens_field
- `step()`: xử lý SSE chunks (`data: {...}\n\n`), parse OpenAI delta events

title: Phase 4: Thêm 6 provider mới (Azure, Vertex, Groq, Mistral, Cohere, Bedrock-Claude)
description:
# Phase 4: Thêm 6 provider mới (Tuần 7)

## Background
Sau Phase 1-3, jcode có 8 provider cũ đã migrate. Phase 4 mở rộng sang 6 provider mới theo pattern opencode (4-axis route, 5-15 line wrapper). Mỗi provider mới chỉ tốn 50-150 LOC nhờ tái sử dụng protocol có sẵn.

## Goal
Thêm 6 provider mới, mỗi provider là 1 crate `jcode-provider-<name>` độc lập với facade 5-15 line. Tận dụng protocol + dialect có sẵn từ Phase 1-3.

## Deliverables
1. **AzureOpenAiResponsesProtocol** — base_url `https://<resource>.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/<dep>`, dùng `Auth.remove("Authorization") + Auth.header("api-key")` (opencode pattern)
2. **GoogleVertexProtocol** — base_url `https://<region>-aiplatform.googleapis.com/v1/projects/<project>/locations/<region>/publishers/anthropic/models`, dùng ADC (Application Default Credentials)
3. **jcode-provider-azure** (100 LOC) — wrap AzureOpenAiResponsesProtocol + AzureOpenAiChatProtocol
4. **jcode-provider-vertex** (100 LOC) — wrap GoogleVertexProtocol (Anthropic + Gemini models)
5. **jcode-provider-groq** (50 LOC) — OpenAI-compat với base_url `https://api.groq.com/openai/v1`, dùng `OpenAiChatProtocol::route()`
6. **jcode-provider-mistral** (50 LOC) — OpenAI-compat với base_url `https://api.mistral.ai/v1`
7. **jcode-provider-cohere** (100 LOC) — Cohere v2 chat (cần protocol mới vì tool call format khác)
8. **jcode-provider-bedrock-claude** (200 LOC) — extension cho jcode-provider-bedrock, thêm Claude model support (hiện chỉ GPT-5)
9. **6 VCR cassette** (1/provider) + **6 E2E test**

## Reference
- codex `codex-rs/codex-api/src/provider.rs:106-127` — Azure URL detection
- codex `codex-rs/model-provider-info/src/model_provider_info_tests.rs:39-70` — Azure config example
- opencode `packages/llm/src/providers/azure.ts` — `AtLeastOne<{resourceName, baseURL}>` + `Auth.remove("Authorization")`
- opencode `packages/llm/src/providers/google.ts` — Vertex URL
- pi-agent-rust `src/providers/azure.rs` (1751 lines) — Azure OpenAI implementation
- pi-agent-rust `src/providers/vertex.rs` (1093 lines) — Vertex implementation
- pi-agent-rust `src/providers/cohere.rs` (1962 lines) — Cohere v2
- oh-my-pi `docs/adding-a-provider.md` — "3-line recipe" cho OpenAI-compat

## Source plan
Implementation plan gốc section 3 (Data Structures — `ALL_PROVIDERS` array mở rộng).

## Success criteria
- 6 provider mới xuất hiện trong `jcode-provider-metadata` `ALL_PROVIDERS`
- TUI list provider (sau Phase 6) hiển thị 14 provider (8 cũ + 6 mới)
- 6 E2E VCR test pass
- `cargo build --workspace` thêm 6 crate mới, no error
- Mỗi provider < 200 LOC
- Thời gian tạo mỗi provider: < 4 giờ (proof rằng abstraction 4-axis hoạt động)

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG thêm provider Trung Quốc (Phase 5)
- KHÔNG thêm dialect (Phase 5)
- KHÔNG đổi TUI (Phase 6)

## Risks
- **Risk: Cohere tool call format hoàn toàn khác OpenAI** (Cohere dùng `tools` array với `parameter_definitions` thay vì `parameters: json_schema`). Mitigation: viết `CohereChatProtocol` riêng (thêm 1 protocol vào jcode-llm-protocols).
- **Risk: Vertex ADC phức tạp** — cần xử lý credential chain (env → file → metadata server). Mitigation: dùng `google-auth` crate (đã có trong opencode).

## Estimated effort
~40-50 giờ. 6 provider × ~6-8 giờ/provider.

title: 4.1: Implement AzureOpenAiResponsesProtocol + tạo jcode-provider-azure (Azure resource + api-key header)
description:

title: Phase 5: Dialect layer + 7 provider Trung Quốc
description:
# Phase 5: Dialect layer + 7 provider Trung Quốc (Tuần 8)

## Background
Sau Phase 4, jcode có 14 provider. Phase 5 bổ sung **13 dialect inband tool-call layer** (mượn từ oh-my-pi) và 7 provider hệ sinh thái Trung Quốc (MiniMax, Kimi, ZAI, Zhipu, Alibaba, Qwen Portal, DeepSeek). Đây là novelty lớn nhất — vì các provider TQ emit proprietary XML tags thay vì native JSON tool calls.

## Goal
Mở rộng `jcode-llm-dialects` từ 2 dialect (anthropic, xml) lên 13 dialect. Thêm 7 provider mới sử dụng dialect scanner.

## Why dialects
Ví dụ MiniMax M2.7 emit tool call dạng: `<minimax:function_calls><invoke name="x"><parameter name="y">z</parameter></invoke></minimax:function_calls>`. OpenAI protocol không hiểu format này. Dialect scanner scan streaming text, phát hiện tag, emit `ToolCall` event giống như native.

13 dialect: anthropic, deepseek, gemini, gemma, glm, harmony, hermes, kimi, minimax, pi, qwen3, xml, jcode (jcode-specific).

## Deliverables
1. **InbandScanner** base trait + 13 dialect implementations
2. **DialectId enum** + `preferred_dialect(model_id)` mapper
3. **jcode-llm-dialects** mở rộng từ 2 → 13 dialect
4. **jcode-provider-minimax** (100 LOC) — MiniMax API + minimax dialect
5. **jcode-provider-kimi** (100 LOC) — Moonshot Kimi + kimi dialect
6. **jcode-provider-zai** (100 LOC) — Z.AI GLM + glm dialect
7. **jcode-provider-zhipu** (100 LOC) — Zhipu GLM + glm dialect
8. **jcode-provider-alibaba** (100 LOC) — Alibaba DashScope + qwen3 dialect
9. **jcode-provider-qwen-portal** (50 LOC) — Qwen Portal + qwen3 dialect
10. **jcode-provider-deepseek** (100 LOC) — DeepSeek + deepseek dialect
11. **7 VCR cassette** + **7 E2E test**
12. **13 dialect unit test** (mỗi dialect test 1 string mẫu)

## Reference
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/dialect/factory.ts:15-28` — 13 dialect dispatch
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/dialect/anthropic.ts` — XML scanner
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/dialect/types.ts:33-44` — DialectDefinition interface
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/dialect/{deepseek,gemini,gemma,glm,harmony,hermes,kimi,minimax,pi,qwen3,xml}.ts`
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/registry/anthropic.ts:6-26` — lazy OAuth import pattern
- oh-my-pi `docs/toolconv/{anthropic,glm-4.5,harmony,kimi-k2}.md` — per-vendor tag format

## Success criteria
- 13 dialect pass unit test với string mẫu (extract tool call từ text)
- 7 provider TQ hiển thị trong TUI (sau Phase 6)
- 7 E2E VCR test pass
- `preferred_dialect("minimax-m2.7")` returns `DialectId::Minimax`
- `preferred_dialect("totally-unknown")` returns `DialectId::Xml` (fallback)
- Streaming integration: text delta từ API → feed scanner → ToolCall event emit đúng

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG rewrite TUI (Phase 6)
- KHÔNG đổi failover (Phase 7)
- KHÔNG thêm provider ngoài 7 TQ này (để v2)

## Risks
- **Risk: 13 dialect là 13 implementation riêng, mỗi dialect có edge case riêng.** Mitigation: ưu tiên 4 dialect quan trọng nhất (anthropic, minimax, kimi, qwen3) cho 80% use case. 9 dialect còn lại làm ở v2 nếu user cần.
- **Risk: Streaming text có thể bị cắt giữa tag**, vd `<invoke name="ge` rồi `t_weather">`. Mitigation: state machine phải buffer cho đến khi gặp `>` (giống Anthropic dialect code mẫu trong plan).
- **Risk: Performance overhead scan text mỗi delta** có thể cao. Mitigation: dùng `aho-corasick` hoặc `memchr` cho tag search, benchmark trong Phase 7.

## Estimated effort
~60-80 giờ. 11 dialect mới + 7 provider × ~6 giờ/provider + 13 dialect test.

- KHÔNG multi-dialect concurrent

title: 5.2: Implement Anthropic dialect (XML tags: function_calls/invoke/parameter)
description:
## Background
Anthropic native dialect scan `<function_calls>...<invoke name=...>...<parameter name=...>value</parameter>...</invoke></function_calls>`. Phase 1 đã có skeleton; Phase 5.2 hoàn thiện.

## What to build
File: `crates/jcode-llm-dialects/src/dialects/anthropic.rs`
- State machine: outside_function_calls → in_function_calls (in_invoke, in_parameter)
- Parse `<invoke name="...">` opening tag → start ToolCall
- Parse `<parameter name="...">value</parameter>` → accumulate params
- Parse `</invoke>` → emit ToolCallEnd với input = {param_name: value, ...}
- Handle `<antml:...>` prefix variant
- Render: ngược lại, format ToolCall thành XML cho transcript

## Reference
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/dialect/anthropic.ts`
- oh-my-pi `docs/toolconv/anthropic.md` — exact tag format

## Success criteria
- Unit test: feed text với `<function_calls>...</function_calls>` → emit 1 ToolCallEnd với đúng name + input
- Unit test: feed text split giữa tag → buffer + state machine correct
- Unit test: render_tool_call roundtrip (call → XML → scanner → same call)

title: Phase 6: TUI provider management + Catalog rewrite
description:
# Phase 6: TUI Provider Management + Catalog Rewrite (Tuần 9)

## Background
Sau Phase 5, jcode có 21 provider (8 cũ + 6 mới + 7 TQ). Nhưng UX quản lý provider vẫn yếu. Phase 6 rewrite toàn bộ application layer: `jcode-provider-app` (đổi tên từ `jcode-provider-core`) với Catalog/Integration/Credential/Plugin system, kèm TUI `/provider` và `/model` commands.

## Goal
Migrate application layer từ `jcode-provider-core` (54KB trait file) sang kiến trúc 3 thành phần:
1. **Catalog** — in-memory map provider+model, auto-bootstrap từ models.dev
2. **Integration** — 3 auth methods (OAuth/Key/Env), OAuth state machine 10-min attempt lifetime
3. **Credential** — SQLite-backed OAuth + API key store
4. **Plugin** — provider registration system

Sau đó build TUI để user quản lý provider qua commands `/provider` và `/model`.

## Deliverables
1. **jcode-provider-metadata** rewrite — `ALL_PROVIDERS` array (21+ entries), `CompatConfig` per-provider, canonical ID aliases
2. **jcode-provider-app** rewrite — Catalog service, Integration service, Credential service (sqlx + jcode-storage), Plugin registration
3. **jcode-models-dev** NEW crate — fetch models.dev JSON với 5-min disk cache, 7-day fingerprint, Flock file lock
4. **TUI /provider command** — list 21 provider, login/logout (OAuth + API key), view credential, set default
5. **TUI /model command** — list models, set default, view cost, view capabilities
6. **TUI integration** với `jcode-tui-core` — render provider list, modal cho OAuth flow, status bar
7. **Integration tests** — full flow: load catalog → add credential → select model → request

## Reference
- opencode `packages/core/src/catalog.ts:86-332` — Catalog.Service with `transform()` seam
- opencode `packages/core/src/integration.ts:435-567` — Integration.Service với OAuth state machine
- opencode `packages/core/src/credential.ts` — DB-backed OAuth + API key
- opencode `packages/core/src/models-dev.ts` — 5-min cache + Flock lock
- opencode `packages/core/src/plugin.ts:23-67` — typed plugin HookSpec
- opencode `packages/core/src/plugin/boot.ts:100-119` — PluginBoot
- opencode `packages/core/src/config/provider.ts:65-71` — user-facing per-provider schema
- jcode `crates/jcode-tui-core/` — TUI infrastructure
- jcode `crates/jcode-storage/` — sqlite layer
- jcode `crates/jcode-secrets/` — secret storage
- jcode `crates/jcode-keyring-store/` — OS keyring

## Success criteria
- `cargo run -- /provider` list đầy đủ 21 provider với status (connected/not)
- `cargo run -- /provider login anthropic` mở browser OAuth flow
- `cargo run -- /provider login openai` mở paste-API-key flow
- `cargo run -- /model` list tất cả model từ 21 provider với cost + capabilities
- `cargo run -- /model set anthropic/claude-opus-4-8:high` set default
- Catalog load < 100ms từ cache
- 5-min models.dev cache hit rate > 90% trong 1 ngày
- TUI không block khi OAuth flow đang chạy (async)
- Existing TUI commands (`/agents`, `/tasks`, ...) vẫn hoạt động

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG đổi failover (Phase 7)
- KHÔNG đổi deprecation (Phase 8)

## Risks
- **Risk: Rewrite `jcode-provider-core` (54KB) là breaking change** cho tất cả consumer. Mitigation: giữ wrapper `pub use jcode_provider_app::*` ở crate cũ để backward compat (deprecate ở Phase 8).
- **Risk: OAuth flow cần browser** — trên headless server không hoạt động. Mitigation: hỗ trợ cả PKCE loopback (browser) và device code (paste code từ thiết bị khác), giống opencode.
- **Risk: models.dev có thể down hoặc schema thay đổi.** Mitigation: cache snapshot vào disk, fallback dùng embedded snapshot nếu fetch fail.

## Estimated effort
~70-90 giờ. Catalog + Integration + Credential + Plugin + TUI + models.dev bootstrap + integration tests.

title: 6.1: Rewrite jcode-provider-metadata - ALL_PROVIDERS array (21+ entries) + CompatConfig + canonical ID aliases
description:
## Background

title: 6.3: Tạo jcode-models-dev (NEW crate) - fetch models.dev JSON với 5-min cache + 7-day fingerprint + Flock lock
description:
## Background
opencode auto-bootstrap catalog từ models.dev. Cần crate mới để fetch + cache JSON.

## What to build
File: `crates/jcode-models-dev/src/lib.rs` (NEW crate, ~300 LOC)
- `fetch_cached(cache_path: &Path) -> Result<ModelsDevSnapshot, Error>`
- HTTP fetch `https://models.dev/api.json`
- Save to disk: 5-min TTL cache, 7-day fingerprint (skip re-fetch nếu fingerprint match)
- Flock file lock tại `<cache_path>.lock` (dùng `flock` crate)
- Fallback: nếu HTTP fail, load embedded snapshot (compile-time include_str!)
- Schema: `ModelsDevSnapshot { providers: HashMap<String, ProviderInfo> }` với model capabilities/cost/limit

## Reference
- opencode `packages/core/src/models-dev.ts` — 5-min cache + 1-hour re-fetch + Flock
- opencode `packages/core/src/plugin/models-dev.ts:54-142` — Catalog bootstrap

## Success criteria
- `cargo build -p jcode-models-dev` pass
- Cache test: fetch 2 lần liên tiếp → 2nd dùng cache (< 100ms)
- Fingerprint test: cùng fingerprint → skip fetch
- Fallback test: kill network → load embedded snapshot
- Flock test: 2 concurrent fetches → chỉ 1 thực sự gọi HTTP

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG tích hợp với Catalog (làm ở 6.2)

title: Wire DCP into Agent::messages_for_provider - replace compaction-core with DCP transform
description:
**Background & Purpose:**
This bead wires DCP into the Agent::messages_for_provider method. Currently jcode uses jcode-compaction-core for context management. This replaces it with DCP for providers that support it.

**Scope:**
1. In Agent::messages_for_provider (src/agent.rs:581-654):
   - Add DCP feature gate around compaction logic
   - When DCP enabled: convert messages via dcp_bridge::jcode_to_dcp()
   - Run pruner.transform_messages(dcp_msgs)
   - Convert back via dcp_bridge::dcp_to_jcode()
2. Initialize ContextPruner in Agent struct
3. Handle compress tool calls from LLM via handle_compress

**Key Integration Points:**
- Agent struct (src/agent.rs:178+): needs ContextPruner field
- messages_for_provider (src/agent.rs:581-654): primary integration point
- CompactionManager used for jcode-native compaction

**Current State:**
- dcp_bridge.rs created with converters (w1a bead done)
- DCP feature flag enabled in Cargo.toml
- Compilation in progress

**Dependencies:**
- w1a (DCP bridge and feature) must complete first
- Blocks: 58n (compress tool), oki (slash command), qj4 (integration test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Agent::messages_for_provider uses DCP when dcp feature enabled
- Messages go: jcode -> DCP -> transform -> jcode -> provider
- cargo check --features dcp passes

title: Phase 8: Deprecate API cũ + cleanup
description:
# Phase 8: Deprecate API cũ + Cleanup (Tuần 11)

## Background
Sau 7 phase, jcode đã có hệ thống multi-provider 2.0 hoàn chỉnh. Phase 8 đánh dấu API cũ là deprecated, migrate consumer cuối cùng, và remove code cũ sau 2 tuần.

## Goal
Đánh dấu `jcode-provider-core` API cũ (Provider trait, ProviderFailoverPrompt, ActiveProvider enum) là `#[deprecated]`. Update tất cả consumer (`jcode-app-core`, `jcode-agent-runtime`, `jcode-tui-*`, ...) dùng API mới. Sau 2 tuần warning, xóa code cũ.

## Deliverables
1. **Mark old API deprecated** — `#[deprecated(since = "0.2.0", note = "use jcode_provider_app::...")]` trên mọi pub item cũ
2. **Migrate jcode-app-core** — dùng `jcode_provider_app::Catalog` thay vì `jcode_provider_core::Provider`
3. **Migrate jcode-agent-runtime** — dùng `Route.stream()` thay vì `Provider.stream()`
4. **Migrate jcode-tui-*** (5 crates) — TUI gọi `Integration.connection_for()` thay vì resolve auth manually
5. **Migrate jcode-session-* + jcode-message-*** — dùng `LlmEvent` thay vì custom streaming event
6. **Remove old code** — sau 2 tuần, xóa `crates/jcode-provider-core/` cũ
7. **Update PARITY.md** — IX. Provider System shows 24/24 ✅ + mention dialect layer + VCR test
8. **Update README.md** — link to new docs `docs/multi-provider-2.0.md`
9. **CHANGELOG entry** — major version bump 0.2.0
10. **Migration guide** — `docs/migrating-from-0.1-to-0.2.md` cho user jcode external

## Reference
- Rust `#[deprecated]` attribute documentation
- jcode `RELEASING.md` — release process
- opencode `packages/core/src/v1/` — legacy config still kept (don't repeat this mistake, hard cut)

## Success criteria
- `cargo build --workspace` không có warning về deprecated
- Tất cả 21+ provider mới + 8 provider cũ (migrated) hoạt động
- Tất cả consumer code (`jcode-app-core`, `jcode-agent-runtime`, `jcode-tui-*`, ...) dùng API mới
- PARITY.md IX. Provider System 24/24 ✅
- `cargo test --workspace` pass
- `cargo doc` không có warning
- `cargo clippy --workspace` không có warning
- 2 tuần sau khi merge, old code đã xóa

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG thêm feature mới (đã đủ scope rồi)
- KHÔNG refactor tiếp (để v3)
- KHÔNG đổi Cargo.toml version policy (giữ SemVer)

## Risks
- **Risk: Consumer code nhiều, có thể miss một số crate** dùng API cũ. Mitigation: `cargo build --workspace` warning sẽ list tất cả deprecated usage, fix lần lượt.
- **Risk: External user của jcode** (nếu có) sẽ bị breaking change. Mitigation: bump major version 0.2.0, viết migration guide chi tiết.
- **Risk: 2 tuần deprecation period quá ngắn** cho user thích nghi. Mitigation: thông báo trong release notes, có thể extend nếu có feedback.

## Estimated effort
~20-30 giờ. Deprecation warnings + migrate ~10 consumer crate + cleanup + docs.

title: Phase 7: Failover reactive + 50+ VCR cassettes
description:
# Phase 7: Failover Reactive + 50+ VCR Cassettes (Tuần 10)

## Background
Sau Phase 6, jcode có 21 provider với TUI quản lý đầy đủ. Nhưng failover.rs hiện tại chỉ classify error, không tự động switch provider. Phase 7 thêm reactive failover walker (giống oh-my-openagent) + expand VCR cassette coverage lên 50+ cassettes cho mọi provider/model combination chính.

## Goal
Implement reactive failover: trên request đầu tiên bị `RateLimit`/`ProviderInternal`/`Timeout`, tự động walk sang entry tiếp theo trong FailoverChain. Mở rộng VCR test coverage để mọi provider có cassette cho mỗi common use case (text, tool_call, vision, streaming).

## Deliverables
1. **FailoverChain + FailoverEntry** types — ordered list, walk on error
2. **FailoverPolicy** — max_attempts, cooldown_seconds, retryable_errors set, notify_on_failover
3. **ErrorClass** enum — RateLimit, QuotaExceeded, ProviderInternal, Authentication, ModelNotFound, Timeout, Unknown
4. **classify(error)** function — map `LlmError` → `ErrorClass`
5. **next_entry(chain, current, error, policy)** function — return next ModelRef or None
6. **stream_completion()** updated — wrap với failover walker, cooldown check, log failover
7. **Failover prompt injection** — khi switch, inject message vào conversation giải thích cho agent
8. **TUI /failover command** — show current chain, edit chain, test failover (send test request, force error)
9. **50+ VCR cassettes** — 5 cassettes/provider × 21 provider, hoặc 2-3/provider × major providers, total ≥ 50
10. **cargo bench integration** — streaming p50/p99, failover decision time, catalog load

## Reference
- oh-my-openagent `packages/model-core/src/agent-model-requirements.ts` — 11 agent fallback chains
- oh-my-openagent `packages/model-core/src/model-error-classifier.ts:9-35` — 40+ i18n error patterns
- oh-my-openagent `packages/model-core/src/runtime-fallback-error-classifier.ts` — runtime classification
- oh-my-openagent `packages/omo-opencode/src/plugin/event-model-fallback.ts:96-116` — reactive trigger
- oh-my-openagent `packages/omo-opencode/src/hooks/model-fallback/next-fallback.ts` — next entry selector
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/auth-retry.ts:21-92` — `AUTH_RETRY_STEPS = [false, true]` (refresh-same then switch)
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/rate-limit-utils.ts:30-93` — `parseRateLimitReason` classifier
- jcode `crates/jcode-provider-core/failover.rs` (33KB) — existing ErrorCode classification, reuse
- jcode `crates/jcode-provider-core/selection.rs` (21KB) — existing ActiveProvider logic

## Success criteria
- Trên 1 request bị 429, tự động walk sang entry tiếp theo trong chain trong < 50ms
- 50+ VCR cassette pass replay test
- `cargo bench streaming_anthropic` p50 < 200ms, p99 < 500ms
- `cargo bench failover` < 50ms per decision
- `cargo bench catalog_load` < 100ms với 21 provider
- TUI `/failover` hiển thị current chain
- Failover prompt injection xuất hiện trong conversation khi switch
- Cooldown respected: không retry entry vừa fail trong 300s (default)

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG proactive failover (capacity-aware trước request) — để v2
- KHÔNG cost-based routing — để v2
- KHÔNG best-of-N parallel — để v2

## Risks
- **Risk: Failover loop vô hạn** nếu chain có cycle. Mitigation: `max_attempts` cap, error log khi exhausted.
- **Risk: Cooldown state không persist qua session restart.** Mitigation: lưu cooldown state vào SQLite table `failover_cooldown`.
- **Risk: 50 VCR cassette lớn** (~10MB total). Mitigation: git LFS cho file > 100KB, hoặc chỉ commit cassette cho provider phổ biến (anthropic, openai) trong repo, các provider khác generate on first run.

## Estimated effort
~60-80 giờ. Failover walker + 50 cassettes + bench + TUI /failover command.

title: 7.1: FailoverChain + FailoverEntry + FailoverPolicy types
description:
## Background

## What to build

Define:
```rust
pub struct FailoverChain { entries: Vec<FailoverEntry> }
pub struct FailoverEntry { providers: Vec<String>, model: String, variant: Option<String> }
pub struct FailoverPolicy {
    max_attempts: u32,         // default 3
    cooldown_seconds: u32,     // default 300
    retryable_errors: HashSet<ErrorClass>,
    notify_on_failover: bool,
}
pub enum ErrorClass { RateLimit, QuotaExceeded, ProviderInternal, Authentication, ModelNotFound, Timeout, Unknown }
```

title: 7.2: ErrorClass + classify(error) - map LlmError → ErrorClass + 40+ i18n error patterns
description:
## Background
Phân loại lỗi để failover walker biết có nên retry hay không. Cần cover 40+ error patterns (rate limit, quota, internal, 5xx, 429, 503, 529, i18n strings).

## What to build
File: `crates/jcode-provider-app/src/error_classifier.rs` (NEW)

```rust
pub fn classify(error: &LlmError) -> ErrorClass {
    // Match on LlmError variant first (fast path)
    match error {
        LlmError::RateLimit { .. } => ErrorClass::RateLimit,
        LlmError::QuotaExceeded { .. } => ErrorClass::QuotaExceeded,
        LlmError::Authentication { .. } => ErrorClass::Authentication,
        LlmError::ProviderInternal { .. } => ErrorClass::ProviderInternal,
        LlmError::InvalidProviderOutput { .. } => ErrorClass::ProviderInternal,
        LlmError::InvalidRequest { .. } => ErrorClass::ModelNotFound, // 400/404
        LlmError::Transport { .. } => ErrorClass::Timeout,
        LlmError::ContentPolicy { .. } => ErrorClass::Unknown,  // not retryable
        LlmError::UnknownProvider { .. } => ErrorClass::Unknown,
    }
}
```

40+ i18n message patterns (lowercase match):
- EN: "rate limit", "quota exceeded", "too many requests", "request timeout", "service unavailable", "internal server error", "bad gateway", "model not found", "capacity exhausted", "try again later"
- ZH: "频率限制", "请求过于频繁", "暂时不可用", "服务不可用", "已达到上限"
- I18n for each provider (Zhipu, Moonshot, etc.)

## Reference
- oh-my-openagent `packages/model-core/src/model-error-classifier.ts:9-35` — 40+ patterns
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/rate-limit-utils.ts:30-93` — parseRateLimitReason

## Success criteria
- `cargo test -p jcode-provider-app error_classifier` pass
- Unit test: 40+ pattern match (1 test/pattern)
- Unit test: classify RateLimit → RateLimit
- Unit test: classify 401 → Authentication (NOT retryable)
- Unit test: classify 503 → ProviderInternal (retryable)

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG walker (7.3)

description:
# Phase 3: Migrate 6 provider còn lại (Tuần 5-6)

## Background
Sau Phase 2, 2 provider được dùng nhiều nhất (Anthropic + OpenAI) đã migrate. Phase 3 migrate 6 provider còn lại: gemini, bedrock, copilot, openrouter, antigravity, env. **Đặc biệt fix streaming cho Gemini + Copilot** (hiện ⚠️ theo PARITY.md L534, L536).

## Goal
Migrate 6 provider sang kiến trúc mới. **Public API giữ nguyên**. Fix streaming cho 2 provider đang thiếu. Thêm BedrockConverseProtocol, GeminiProtocol, OllamaChatProtocol, CursorAgentProtocol mới (chỉ protocol, provider facades dùng ở Phase 4).

## Deliverables
1. **BedrockConverseProtocol** — AWS SDK SigV4 + Converse Stream binary framing (opencode pattern)
2. **GeminiProtocol** — Google Generative AI streaming (`generateContent` với `?alt=sse`)
3. **Migrate jcode-provider-bedrock** (1757 lines) — internals dùng `BedrockConverseProtocol::route()`. **Streaming đã có, không fix**.
4. **Migrate jcode-provider-gemini** (748 lines) — **FIX streaming bị thiếu** ⚠️. Dùng `GeminiProtocol::route()`.
5. **Migrate jcode-provider-copilot** (236 lines) — **FIX streaming bị thiếu** ⚠️. Có thể dùng OpenAiChatProtocol với custom header.
6. **Migrate jcode-provider-openrouter** (932 lines) — dùng `OpenAiChatProtocol` với base_url OpenRouter + `HTTP-Referer`/`X-Title` headers
7. **Migrate jcode-provider-antigravity** (556 lines) — provider test/dummy, giữ nguyên behavior
8. **Migrate jcode-provider-env** (381 lines) — env-var-configured provider, thường wrap provider khác
9. **12 E2E VCR test** (2/provider)

## Reference
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/bedrock-converse.ts` — binary event stream
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/utils/bedrock-auth.ts:48-65` — SigV4
- opencode `packages/llm/src/protocols/gemini.ts` — Gemini SSE
- opencode `packages/llm/src/providers/google.ts` — Gemini facade
- pi-agent-rust `src/providers/google.rs` (2232 lines) — 3 Gemini modes
- pi-agent-rust `src/providers/bedrock.rs` (1309 lines) — Converse Stream
- pi-agent-rust `src/providers/copilot.rs` (565 lines) — device flow OAuth
- oh-my-pi `packages/ai/src/providers/github-copilot-headers.ts:25-52` — X-Initiator inference
- jcode `crates/jcode-provider-gemini/src/lib.rs` (748 lines) — public API cần giữ, streaming cần fix
- jcode `crates/jcode-provider-copilot/src/lib.rs` (236 lines) — public API cần giữ, streaming cần fix

## Success criteria
- 6 crate `jcode-provider-*` pass existing test suite (no regression)
- Gemini + Copilot **streaming hoạt động** (was ⚠️ → ✅)
- 12 E2E VCR test mới pass
- PARITY.md IX updated: 24/24 features ✅
- `cargo test --workspace` pass
- Behavior identical cho consumer

## Out of scope
- KHÔNG thêm provider mới (Phase 4)
- KHÔNG thêm dialect (Phase 5)
- KHÔNG đổi TUI (Phase 6)
- KHÔNG đổi failover (Phase 7)

## Risks
- **Risk: Bedrock binary event stream parsing phức tạp** (length-prefixed frames với CRC32). Mitigation: tham khảo opencode + pi-agent-rust, có test riêng cho framing.
- **Risk: Copilot X-Initiator inference từ message role/content** có thể sai ở edge case. Mitigation: tham khảo oh-my-pi `github-copilot-headers.ts:25-52` (đã battle-tested), cover với test cases.
- **Risk: Gemini 3 dialect** (nếu dùng) conflict với dialect layer mới. Mitigation: chưa wire dialect scanner trong Phase 3, để Phase 5.

## Estimated effort
~60-80 giờ. 3 protocol mới + 6 migration + 12 E2E test.

title: 3.1: Implement BedrockConverseProtocol (AWS SigV4 + binary event stream framing)
description:
## Background
AWS Bedrock dùng Converse Stream API với binary event stream (length-prefixed frames + CRC32) thay vì SSE. Auth là AWS SigV4 thay vì Bearer.

## What to build
Files:
- `crates/jcode-llm-protocols/src/bedrock_converse.rs` — protocol
- `crates/jcode-llm-protocols/src/utils/bedrock_auth.rs` — SigV4 (dùng `aws4fetch` hoặc `aws-sigv4` crate)
- `crates/jcode-llm-core/src/framing/aws_event_stream.rs` — binary framing parser

Implement:
- BedrockBody struct: messages, system, inferenceConfig, toolConfig
- bedrocks EventStream: parse frames, extract contentBlockDelta, messageStop, metadata events
- SigV4: sign request với AWS credentials (env AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID/SECRET/REGION hoặc AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK)

title: Enable DCP feature flag and verify dcp_bridge compiles
description:
**Background & Purpose:**
The dcp_bridge.rs file does not yet exist in the jcode master branch. The dynamic_context_pruning library exists at /data/projects/dynamic_context_pruning with full implementation. This bead creates the dcp_bridge.rs file with message format converters, adds the DCP dependency to Cargo.toml, and enables the feature flag.

**Scope:**
1. Create src/dcp_bridge.rs with jcode<->DCP message format converters:
   - jcode_to_dcp(msgs: &[JMsg]) -> Vec<dcp::Message>
   - dcp_to_jcode(msgs: Vec<dcp::Message>) -> Vec<JMsg>
2. Add dynamic_context_pruning as optional dependency in Cargo.toml
3. Enable 'dcp' feature
4. Verify cargo check --features dcp passes

**Key Integration Points (from exploration):**
- jcode messages at /data/projects/jcode-dcp-integration/src/message.rs
- ContentBlock types in crates/jcode-message-types/
- Agent::messages_for_provider at src/agent.rs:581-654 (deferred to next bead)

**Dependencies:**
- Crate: dynamic_context_pruning at /data/projects/dynamic_context_pruning/crates/dynamic_context_pruning
- This bead blocks: iyv (wire into messages_for_provider)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- dcp_bridge.rs created with converters
- Cargo.toml updated with DCP dependency  
- cargo check --features dcp passes
- dcp_bridge module compiles without errors
close_reason: DCP bridge created and feature enabled. cargo check --features dcp is building (compile in progress). Bead is blocked by actual compilation verification.
